headline: UnitedHealth Expands Doula And AI Tools As Valuation Gap Persists
summary: UnitedHealth Group (NYSE:UNH) is rolling out UnitedHealthcare Doula Support nationwide, giving more than 7 million members access to expanded maternal health services. The company is also scaling its AI powered care companion, Avery, with a broader deployment expected to reach over 20 million members. These moves reflect a push into whole person care and digital tools that sit alongside UnitedHealth’s core insurance offerings. For investors tracking NYSE:UNH, the focus has recently been on...

headline: Higher Medicare Advantage Rates Push U.S. Managed Care Stocks Higher
summary: US managed care insurers saw a notable bump to their stock prices this week following news of higher than anticipated Medicare Advantage rates for 2027. Read more here.
